dependencies.description: The PyPA recommended tool for installing Python packages.
dependencies.name: py-pip

dependencies.description:
A Python utility that aids in the process of downloading, building,
upgrading, installing, and uninstalling Python packages.
dependencies.name: py-setuptools

dependencies.description: A Spack managed Python virtual environment
dependencies.name: python-venv

dependent_to.description:
b2luigi is a helper package constructed around luigi that helps you
schedule working packages (so-called tasks) locally or on a batch
system. Apart from the very powerful dependency management system by
luigi, b2luigi extends the user interface and has a built-in support for
the queue systems, e.g. LSF and HTCondor.
dependent_to.name: py-b2luigi

dependent_to.description:
Scalable asynchronous hyperparameter optimization, neural architecture
search, and parallel ensemble of predictive models.
dependent_to.name: py-deephyper

dependent_to.description: parse_type extends the parse module (opposite of string.format()).
dependent_to.name: py-parse-type

dependent_to.description:
RADICAL-SAGA (RS) implements the interface specification of the Open
Grid Forum (OGF) Simple API for Grid Applications (SAGA) standard. RS
works as a light-weight access layer for distributed computing
infrastructures, providing adaptors for different middleware systems and
services.
dependent_to.name: py-radical-saga

description: parse() is the opposite of format()
name: py-parse

variants.description: Build systems supported by the package
variants.name: build_system
